title: Goal Ledger Line
description: One line per daily re-verification of a goals/*.goal.md contract. Goals graduate, they do not close — this ledger is the record that a finished thing is still true. A VIOLATED entry names the goal; the fix goes through the normal queue, not a shortcut here.

goal_id.description: Matches a file in goals/, e.g. queue_receipts_visible.goal.md

predicate.description: The deterministic check that was run — must be shell/script-checkable, not a judgment call.
